title: Workspace runtime primitive families
description: Family-level ownership inventory for root workspace_runtime_primitives.py behavior and high-confidence declarative migrations.

schema_version.description: Contract version for the workspace runtime primitive family inventory.

summary.description: Short purpose statement for the inventory.

source_path.description: Runtime source file whose root primitive families are classified by this inventory.

classification_rule.description: Rule used to separate command-generation-owned, contract-owned, AW-owned, package-owned, and blocked families.

migrated_family_id.description: Family id for the concrete migration delivered by the current inventory slice.

migrated_to.description: Contract or generated surface that now owns the migrated declaration.

owner_class.description: Owner class for the migrated family.

migrated_from.description: Previous owner location for the migrated declaration.

migrated_to.description: New contract or generated owner location for the migrated declaration.

closure_role.description: How this migration contributes to issue or PR closure.

migrated_families.description: All primitive families whose ownership declaration moved in this slice.

runtime_consumers.description: Runtime or checker surfaces that consume the migrated declaration.

proof.description: Proof command that validates the migrated declaration path.

compatibility.description: Compatibility impact of moving the declaration to this contract.

migration_policy.description: Concrete migration metadata for the first safe family moved out of hand-authored Python ownership.

owner_surface.description: Primary source of truth or owner surface for the family.

runtime_role.description: What runtime code may still do for this family.

source_symbols.description: Representative runtime or checker symbols for the family.

aw_owned_primitive_ids.description: AW-owned primitive IDs declared by this family when applicable.

schema_version.description: Expected command-generation generated artifact metadata schema version.

source_ir_schema_version.description: Expected command package IR schema version used as generated artifact source.

python.description: Expected command-generation Python target layout version.

typescript.description: Expected command-generation TypeScript target layout version.

target_layout_versions.description: Expected generated target layout versions by target kind.

generated_artifact_metadata_expectations.description: CG-owned generated artifact metadata expectations consumed by generated package proof.

generated_or_contract_refs.description: Contract, generated artifact, or package surfaces related to this family.

proof_refs.description: Proof commands or checks covering this family.

blocked_by.description: Issues or missing generic capabilities that block further migration.

remaining_hand_owned_reason.description: Why any remaining runtime code stays hand-owned for now.
